revision.text:
<includeonly>{{error|Error: The retired template {{tn|!}} has been transcluded; see [[mw:Help:Magic words#Escaped characters]] for details. To fix this, use only the code {{Magic word|!}} to generate the | character.}}
[[Category:Pages which use a template in place of a magic word|M{{PAGENAME}}]]
</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation|heading=[[File:Test Template Info-Icon - Version (2).svg|50px|link=|alt=]] Magic word documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{error|Error: The retired template {{tn|!}} has been transcluded; see  for details. To fix this, use only the code {{Magic word|!}} to generate the | character.}}

</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation|heading=[[File:Test Template Info-Icon - Version (2).svg|50px|link=|alt=]] Magic word documentation}}
</noinclude>

{{draft categories|
[[Category:Pages which use a template in place of a magic word|M{{PAGENAME}}]]
[[Category:unused templates]]
}}
[[mw:Help:Magic words#Escaped characters]]
#redirect[[:en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects !]]
#redirect[[:en:Template:!]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects !]]

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects !]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects !]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects !]]
#redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects !]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia template redirects !
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:!]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23124421395|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=%21 here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <includeonly>{{error|Error: The retired template {{tn|!}} has been transcluded; see [[mw:Help:Magic words#Escaped characters]] for details. To fix this, use only the code {{Magic word|!}} to generate the | character.}} </includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation|heading=[[File:Test Template Info-Icon - Version (2).svg|50px|link=|alt=]] Magic word documentation}}
